summary: CP at exactly 0.65 threshold; has never exceeded 0.65 in February; needs STRICTLY above for YES
content: Current CP: 0.65 (exact threshold). In February 2026, CP has never been above 0.65 - spent most time at 0.60, dipped to 0.57. Take-Two confirmed Nov 19 release on Feb 3 but CP didn't rise above 0.65. 749 forecasters = stable base. No catalysts expected before Feb 28 (marketing starts summer). Downward bias since late Dec (0.70+ -> 0.60).
